author: Niche Gamer
text:
Final Fantasy VII Revelation announced Square Enix has officially announced/revealed Final Fantasy VII Revelation, the final entry in their Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy. As previously announced, Final Fantasy VII Revelation is set to launch simultaneously for all platforms sometime in spring 2027 for PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, Switch 2, and PS5. The previous game, Final Fantasy VII Rebirth, was released back in […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
The Wolf Among Us Remastered announced Publisher Warner Bros. and developer TellTale Games has announced The Wolf Among Us Remastered. The Wolf Among Us Remastered is et to launch sometime this holiday ahead of The Wolf Among Us 2, which now launches in 2027. Developing.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
The Wolf Among Us 2 finally launches in 2027 Publisher Warner Bros. and developer TellTale Games has announced The Wolf Among Us 2 is finally launching next year. The Wolf Among Us 2 is finally set to launch sometime in 2027. Developing.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Monster Hunter Wilds: Ascendance massive expansion announced As promised, Capcom has announced Monster Hunter Wilds: Ascendance, a massive new expansion for their hunting action game. The base game Monster Hunter Wilds is available now across for PC (via Steam), Xbox Series X|S, and PS5. Get our review here! Developing.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Virtua Fighter Crossroads officially revealed Publisher Sega and developer Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio have officially re-revealed their new Virtua Fighter project with its official title: Virtua Fighter Crossroads. A release for Virtua Fighter Crossroads is now set for sometime in 2027, though release platforms weren’t confirmed. Here’s the big re-reveal trailer:

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Guild Wars 3 announced Publisher NCSOFT and developer ArenaNet have announced Guild Wars 3, a new successor to their beloved MMORPG series. While a release date for Guild Wars 3 wasn’t announced, its first playable beta is set for sometime this fall. Developing.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Gundam Rogue Orbit announced Bandai Namco has announced Gundam Rogue Orbit, a new roguelike spinoff game set in the beloved mecha franchise. Gundam Rogue Orbit is in development for Windows PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, and PS5, though a release date wasn’t announced. Here’s a trailer:

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin ARPG officially revealed Paramount Games Studio and developer PlatinumGames have finally fully revealed Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin, a new action RPG based on the popular spinoff comics. Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Last Ronin is in development, though a release date and release platforms weren’t announced. The game was originally teased back in 2023. Here’s the reveal […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
STRANGER THAN HEAVEN release date set for January 2027 Publisher Sega and developer Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio revealed a release date for STRANGER THAN HEAVEN. The previously announced adventure game is launching for Windows PC (Steam, Microsoft Store), Xbox Series X|S, and PS5 on January 15th. Developing.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Blood Message gets new gameplay trailer at Summer Game Fest NetEase Games is stepping into new territory with Blood Message, a cinematic single-player action-adventure that could end up being one of the company’s most ambitious projects yet. Set during the final years of China’s Tang Dynasty in 848 AD, Blood Message follows an ordinary messenger and his young son as they embark on a dangerous […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Fumito Ueda officially reveals new game gen ATLAS Fans of Ico, Shadow of the Colossus, and The Last Guardian finally have a name to attach to Fumito Ueda’s next project. During Summer Game Fest 2026, genDESIGN officially announced gen ATLAS alongside a brand-new trailer. Previously known as Project Robot, gen ATLAS is a single-player action-adventure set on a mysterious abandoned world. Players awaken […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Alien: Isolation 2 officially announced After years of teasers, Creative Assembly has finally officially announced and revealed Alien: Isolation 2. Alien: Isolation 2 is in development for Windows PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, Switch 2, and PS5, though a release date wasn’t announced. Developing.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Studio MDHR announces new Cuphead game and retro spin-off Studio MDHR surprised fans during Summer Game Fest 2026 with not one, but two major Cuphead announcements. The biggest reveal is that a brand-new Cuphead game is officially in development. The studio confirmed that its next major project will take Cuphead and friends on an entirely new adventure, though details remain scarce for now. Development […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Resident Evil: Veronica announced As promised, Capcom has announced Resident Evil: Veronica, a new remake/reimagining of the classic game Resident Evil: Code Veronica. Resident Evil: Veronica is in development for Windows PC (Steam), Xbox Series X|S, Switch 2, and PlayStation 5 with a release set for 2027. Developing.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Stellar Blade Bloodrain announced Developer SHIFT UP has announced Stellar Blade Bloodrain, a new sequel they have early in development. Developing.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
XBOX CEO wants XBOX to become the number one gaming company by 2030 XBOX CEO Asha Sharma has laid out an ambitious goal for the future of Microsoft’s gaming business: making XBOX the number one gaming and entertainment company by 2030. Speaking in a recent interview with Bloomberg Tech, Sharma repeatedly emphasized that growing XBOX into the industry’s leading entertainment brand is her primary mission. According to her, […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Overstimulating shooter FISH launches this month Fish is a frenzied fever dream where you platform and battle through chaos as a fish with a gun. Early access is on the way in June.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
3D Shovel Knight game still in development The Shovel Knight IP is still striving for a jump to 3D, and the project hasn't been stalled in the wake of Mina the Hollower.

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Animaly Bar: NO HUMANITY! gets playable demo Indie developer Domnaier has released a playable demo for Animaly Bar: NO HUMANITY!, their bar management thriller game. In Animaly Bar: NO HUMANITY!, animals won the war against humans and the world is now under their control. You play as a gorilla bartender at Animaly Bar, where you prepare drinks for guests and carefully observe their behavior. […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Retro Japanese horror game Stroll Walk looks terrifying Indie developer Kazumi Game Studios has been developing Stroll Walk, a low-poly Japanese horror game where you guide a girl home and avoid monsters. In Stroll Walk you have to survive a world similar to modern Japan, only eerily silent and devoid of people. Guide the young girl and escape from the horrifying, otherworldly creatures that constantly […]

Source
